structural_note: AC-4/AC-5 assert the specific created _id; AC-2/AC-3 are existence-only (total>=1). No false pass observed: every name-variety project (incl. degenerate empty/whitespace) genuinely persists with a matching name and valid id. Contrast: the lifecycle VD's checks certify a hollow-able execution outcome, this VD certifies a static resource that cannot be hollow.
